title: The Cycle of Continuous Internal Evaluation
description: A flowchart illustrating the ongoing, iterative process of evaluating an AI system from the inside to ensure it remains aligned with human needs, values, and performance standards.
elements: Define Evaluation Criteria (Human Values, Ethics, Performance Metrics)
relationships: The process is a continuous loop: Criteria -> Monitor -> Analyze -> Identify -> Adjust -> Deploy, which then feeds back into the Monitor stage to begin the cycle again.
